message:
Command `
# ABC running 4m05s, still on CPU register file mapping.
# The synth log hasn't grown (still 13MB). ABC is working in memory.
# Monitor every 5 minutes.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 300
    PROCS=$(ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|yosys|openroad|abc)" | grep -v grep | wc -l)
    LOG_BYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_synth2.log 2>/dev/null)
    SYNTH_LOG=$(wc -c < "$RUN_DIR/77-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log" 2>/dev/null)
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    ABC_TIME=$(ps -p 1436390 -o etime= 2>/dev/null || echo "done")
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] SYNTH=${SYNTH_LOG}B PROCS=$PROCS STEP=$STEP FINAL=$FINAL ABC=$ABC_TIME"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
    [ "$PROCS" = "0" ] && echo "All processes done!" && break
done
` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "
# ABC running 4m05s, still on CPU register file mapping.
# The synth log hasn't grown (still 13MB). ABC is working in memory.
# Monitor every 5 minutes.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 300
    PROCS=$(ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|yosys|openroad|abc)" | grep -v grep | wc -l)
    LOG_BYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_synth2.log 2>/dev/null)
    SYNTH_LOG=$(wc -c < "$RUN_DIR/77-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log" 2>/dev/null)
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    ABC_TIME=$(ps -p 1436390 -o etime= 2>/dev/null || echo "done")
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] SYNTH=${SYNTH_LOG}B PROCS=$PROCS STEP=$STEP FINAL=$FINAL ABC=$ABC_TIME"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
    [ "$PROCS" = "0" ] && echo "All processes done!" && break
done
" timed out
